name: Canva
description: Drag-and-drop design tool for social graphics, presentations, posters, videos, and more. Huge template library included.

name: CloudConvert
description: Convert between 200+ file formats in the cloud. Supports images, video, audio, documents, ebooks, and more.

name: Coolors
description: Fast color palette generator. Hit spacebar to generate harmonious palettes, extract colors from images, or browse trending palettes from the community.

name: Figma
description: Collaborative UI/UX design tool for web and mobile. Build wireframes, prototypes, and design systems with your team in real-time.

name: Font Changer
description: Generate stylised Unicode text and fancy fonts for social bios, Discord usernames, and posts. No install needed.

name: Fontshare
description: Free, high-quality fonts from Indian Type Foundry. Professional-grade typefaces completely free for personal and commercial use. No attribution required.

name: Framer
description: Design and publish production-ready websites with zero code. The go-to tool for interactive prototypes, portfolios, and landing pages that actually ship.

name: GitMind
description: Online mind-mapping and flowchart tool. Brainstorm ideas, plan projects, and create visual diagrams collaboratively.

name: Iconer
description: Browse and download thousands of icons across multiple icon packs. Filter by style, category, and export format.

name: iLoveIMG
description: Browser-based image tools: resize, compress, crop, convert formats, add watermarks, and rotate images in bulk.

name: Lottie Files
description: Library of lightweight, scalable JSON animations for web and mobile. Download free Lottie files or create your own. Embed animations without video files.

name: Photopea
description: Free browser-based photo editor that supports PSD, XCF, and Sketch files. A capable Photoshop alternative with no install.

name: Pixabay
description: Free stock images, videos, music, and vectors contributed by creators worldwide. No attribution required on most content.

name: Remove.bg
description: AI-powered background remover. Upload any photo and get a clean cutout in seconds. Free previews, paid for full resolution.

name: Rive
description: Design and ship interactive animations to any platform. Create state machines, game UI, and micro-interactions that respond to user input in real time.

name: Shots.so
description: Create stunning mockups for screenshots and designs. Choose from 500+ device frames, backgrounds, and styles. Perfect for app store previews and social posts.

name: Spline
description: 3D design tool for the web. Create interactive 3D scenes, animations, and games that run directly in the browser. No 3D experience needed.

name: Unsplash
description: Massive library of high-resolution photos contributed by photographers worldwide. Free to use with an optional paid subscription for teams.

name: Web2PDF
description: Paste any URL and instantly generate a PDF of the web page. Useful for saving articles, invoices, and documentation.

name: Figma
description: The industry-standard collaborative design tool. Real-time multiplayer editing for UI, prototypes, and design systems.

name: Haikei
description: Generate unique SVG backgrounds, blobs, and patterns for design projects. Fully customisable and free to export.

name: unDraw
description: Open-source illustrations that update their colour to match your brand. Hundreds of free vector graphics for any project.

name: Pexels
description: Free stock photos and videos with no attribution required. High-quality images for any commercial project.

name: Penpot
description: Open-source design and prototyping tool, fully web-based. A free alternative to Figma with no vendor lock-in.

name: Fontjoy
description: Generate font pairings using deep learning. Find combinations you'd never think to try yourself.

name: Mockuuups Studio
description: Generate realistic product and device mockups in seconds. Great for showcasing apps, packaging, and print designs.

name: Iconify
description: Search over 200,000 open-source icons from 150+ icon sets in one unified, framework-agnostic library.
